articles.title: Kohli refuses to shake hands with Head after SRH vs RCB game
articles.description: Virat Kohli and Travis Head had exchanged words earlier during the game, in which SRH beat RCB by 55 runs

articles.title: SRH win big but RCB, GT seal top two spots
articles.description: Fifties from Kishan, Klaasen and Abhishek propelled SRH to a massive score, but RCB ensured their net run-rate stayed good enough to take them to Qualifier 1

articles.title: PBKS meet LSG with playoffs hopes hanging by a thread
articles.description: While a win may not be enough for PBKS to make the playoffs, a loss to LSG will end their campaign

articles.title: Vijay Shankar retires from Indian domestic cricket and the IPL
articles.description: The move will enable the 35-year-old allrounder to play in overseas franchise leagues

articles.title: Bangladesh to tour Zimbabwe for all-format series in June-July
articles.description: Upcoming series will mark Zimbabwe's first home assignment this year, and their first international action since the T20 World Cup

articles.title: Exiled Afghanistan women to tour England during T20 World Cup
articles.description: Afghan Refugee Women's Team will start their tour on June 22

articles.title: Duleep Trophy to kick off Indian domestic season; two-phase Ranji Trophy starts October 11
articles.description: The first part of the Ranji Trophy will be played between October and November, and the second phase between January and February

articles.title: Pat Cummins: 'My priority is Australian cricket'
articles.description: Cummins says playing cricket for Australia and the IPL are the main focuses for the "next few years at least"

articles.title: Taijul takes six as Bangladesh complete 2-0 sweep
articles.description: Rizwan's 94 went in vain as Pakistan fell 78 short of their target of 437

articles.title: Bumrah rested for Afghanistan Test; Rahul replaces Pant as vice-captain
articles.description: Rohit Sharma and Virat Kohli are in the ODI squad as India build towards the 2027 World Cup

articles.title: 'We only have ourselves to blame for where we are' - Ricky Ponting laments missed opportunities ahead of clash vs LSG
articles.description: "We had that washout against Kolkata Knight Riders, and I think from that moment on we've just been a little bit off and as I said they're small things," Ricky Ponting stated.

articles.title: Kris Srikkanth accuses CSK of 'deceiving' loyal fans in the name of MS Dhoni
articles.description: The wicketkeeper-batter did not feature even once for the five-time champions, even after it was reported that he would miss just the early games due to a calf issue.

articles.title: Ireland squad for one-off Test against New Zealand announced, Paul Stirling out with injury
articles.description: Andrew Balbirnie, the only player to feature in all 12 Irish Tests so far, will captain the side once more.
